name: a2ui-studio
description: Experiment with the A2UI protocol (a2ui.org) — generate live, agent-driven UIs with GitHub Copilot, Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or Ollama, rendered right inside VS Code.

commands.title: A2UI: Set AI Provider API Key

chatParticipants.name: a2ui
chatParticipants.description: Generate an A2UI surface from a description

walkthroughs.title: Get started with A2UI Studio
walkthroughs.description: Generate live, agent-driven UIs from plain language — with any AI provider.

steps.title: Open the studio
steps.description:
The playground, dashboard, arena and gallery all live in one panel.
[Open A2UI Studio](command:a2ui.openPlayground)

steps.title: Play an instant demo
steps.description: Two prerecorded A2UI streams render with zero AI setup — feel the protocol in seconds from the Gallery view.

steps.title: Pick your AI provider
steps.description:
GitHub Copilot works with zero configuration. Claude, OpenAI and Gemini need a key.
[Set an API key](command:a2ui.setApiKey)

steps.title: Share a team config
steps.description:
Commit a2ui.config.json to share provider profiles, gateways and prompt rules.
[Create config file](command:a2ui.openConfigFile)

viewsWelcome.contents:
**A2UI Studio** — experiment with agent-driven interfaces.

Describe any UI in plain language and watch an AI agent stream a live, interactive A2UI surface.

[$(sparkle) Open Playground](command:a2ui.openPlayground)

Preview an A2UI JSONL stream from a file:
[$(open-preview) Preview Current File](command:a2ui.previewFile)

Learn more at [a2ui.org](https://a2ui.org).

enumDescriptions: GitHub Copilot via the VS Code Language Model API (no API key needed)
Ollama running locally (no API key needed)
Remote A2UI-capable A2A agent (experimental, requires a2ui.a2aEndpoint)
a2ui.provider.description: Which AI provider generates A2UI messages.

a2ui.model.description: Model ID override. Leave empty for the provider default (Copilot: best available chat model, Anthropic: claude-sonnet-5, OpenAI: gpt-4o, Gemini: gemini-2.0-flash, Ollama: llama3.2).

a2ui.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for generation. Profiles in a2ui.config.json can override this.

a2ui.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per turn. Profiles in a2ui.config.json can override this.

a2ui.systemPromptAppend.description: Extra instructions appended to the A2UI system prompt (brand voice, design rules, preferred colors). a2ui.config.json can override this.

a2ui.ollamaUrl.description: Base URL of the local Ollama server.

a2ui.baseUrls.markdownDescription: Custom API base URLs per provider — for enterprise gateways/proxies (AWS Bedrock proxies, LiteLLM, etc.). The studio also fetches the live model list from these URLs (`{baseUrl}/v1/models`), so nothing is hardcoded. API keys become optional when a gateway is set (the gateway does its own auth). Profiles in `a2ui.config.json` can override per profile.

a2ui.a2aEndpoint.description: URL of a remote A2UI-capable A2A agent (JSON-RPC message/stream). Used by the experimental "Remote A2A agent" provider.

a2ui.autoRepair.description: When the model emits invalid A2UI messages, automatically send one corrective follow-up turn asking it to fix them.
